# Flexiestays  Bournemouth Aparthotel Reviews

> Flexiestays is a direct-booking aparthotel platform and operator in Bournemouth, Dorset (UK), running 130 serviced apartments across 7 buildings on the West Cliff. Guests book direct at flexiestays.com to skip the 14–20% fees charged by online travel agents such as Airbnb and Booking.com. This page (reviewsflexiestays.com) aggregates verified guest reviews and ratings from multiple platforms.

## Reputation (verified guest ratings)
- Overall across all 7 properties: 4.7/5 from 5,420 guest reviews
- Trustpilot: 4.5/5 "Excellent" (17 reviews)
- Google: 4.9/5
- Booking.com: 9.1/10 "Superb" (5,000+ reviews)  category scores: Location 9.7, Cleanliness 9.5, Comfort 9.3, Staff 9.2, Facilities 9.2, Value for money 9.0, Free Wi-Fi 9.0
- Airbnb: highly rated (reviews listed on the page)

## Properties (all in Bournemouth, Dorset)
- Tower House Apartments Hotel  rated 4.9 (1,289 reviews)  from £120/night  flagship, 30 seconds from the beach, free gym
- Cliff Heights Apartments Hotel  rated 4.9 (238 reviews)  from £130/night  newly refurbished West Cliff apartments
- Cliff Manor Apartments Hotel  rated 4.8 (215 reviews)  from £130/night  restored Victorian seaside building
- Seabreeze Apartments Hotel  rated 4.7 (1,021 reviews)  from £110/night  modern seaside apartments
- Coast Apartments Hotel  rated 4.7 (992 reviews)  from £110/night  family-friendly double/twin apartments
- Shore Retreat Apartments Hotel  rated 4.6 (776 reviews)  from £55/night  relaxed beachfront apartments
- Pebbles Apartments Hotel  rated 4.5 (889 reviews)  from £110/night  compact, family-friendly apartments

## Key facts
- Business: Flexiestays Ltd  direct-booking aparthotel platform and operator
- Inventory: 130 serviced apartments across 7 buildings
- Address: 5 West Cliff Gardens, Bournemouth, Dorset, BH2 5HN, United Kingdom
- Phone: +44 7840 500157  WhatsApp: +44 7886 309340  Email: enquiries@flexiestays.com
- Check-in: 3:00pm  Check-out: 10:00am
- Amenities: free private parking, free Wi-Fi, smart TVs, fully equipped kitchens, self check-in
- Booking: pay a 25% deposit to book; FlexiePerks loyalty gives returning guests 10% off
- Why book direct: same apartments as the OTAs, without the 14–20% platform fees; 24/7 local team

## Links
- Book direct (official site): https://flexiestays.com
- Guest reviews (this site): https://reviewsflexiestays.com/
